# Vague Request: Customer Dashboard

Build a dashboard for the customer team so they can see what is going on with
accounts and know who needs attention. It should be easy to use and ready for
the next planning meeting.

## Reviewer Notes

This request intentionally omits:

- primary users and their decisions,
- allowed data sources,
- acceptance criteria,
- risk and privacy expectations,
- non-goals,
- delivery format,
- deadline meaning.
